prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 海南省海军军医大学（综合类）仅有2022年录取数据可查，当年最低位次约12288名。2021、2023、2024、2025年录取数据在数据源中缺失，无法获取完整位次走 势，2025年基准位次无法确定，仅以2022年数据作为参考起点；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2022年为19人，2026年招生计划显示仍为19人，计划人 数持平。2021、2023、2024、2025年分省计划，无法对比完整计划变化趋势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 海军军医大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名未进 入前200名（属200名以外），学校类型为军事类，位于上海市。作为军队医学院校，其无军籍地方生招生在各省份具有独特定位；该校在抖音平台综合热度排名 第9（高热），视频数14条，综合热度约532万，主要传播内容涉及八年制临床医学、军校招生等，社会关注度极高。声誉评价文件未收录该校专门条目，无显著负面舆情信号；第五轮学科评估文件中未收录海军军医大学的学科评估数据，无法获取该校A类学科信息。该校作为军医大学，临床医学、药学等为其传统优势领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业在2024-2026年专业热度分析中持续为\"推荐\"至\"高热推荐\"，医学类专业整体报考热度高。海南省考生总数从2022年55945人增长至2025年67408人 ，2026年约78000人（数据含不确定标记），考生规模持续扩大，竞争加剧。，略有上升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2022年基准位次约12288名、2026年招生计划与2022年持平（19人）、海南省考生总数持续大幅增长（2022→2026增幅约39.5%）、判断2026年竞争较2022年明显加剧，位次应后移。预测2026年最低位次约12588名，区间12088–13088名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: For Hainan Province, Naval Medical University (Comprehensive category) only has admission data for 2022 available, with the lowest ranking approximately 12,288. Admission data for 2021, 2023, 2024, and 2025 are missing from the data source, making it impossible to obtain a complete ranking trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 cannot be determined, and only the 2022 data is used as a reference starting point. The university's enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Hainan Province was 19 in 2022, and the 2026 enrollment plan still shows 19, indicating a stable number. Provincial plans for 2021, 2023, 2024, and 2025 are unavailable, preventing a comparison of the complete plan change trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Naval Medical University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It is not ranked in the top 200 of the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (outside the top 200). The university type is military, located in Shanghai. As a military medical university, its enrollment of local students without military status has a unique positioning in various provinces. On the Douyin platform, the university ranks 9th in comprehensive popularity (high heat), with 14 videos and a comprehensive popularity of approximately 5.32 million. The main content involves eight-year clinical medicine, military school enrollment, etc., with extremely high social attention. The reputation evaluation file does not include a dedicated entry for this university, and there are no significant negative public opinion signals. The fifth round of discipline evaluation files does not include discipline evaluation data for Naval Medical University, so information on its A-class disciplines cannot be obtained. As a military medical university, clinical medicine and pharmacy are its traditional advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The clinical medicine major has been consistently rated as 'Recommended' to 'Highly Recommended' in the 2024-2026 major popularity analysis, with overall high application heat for medical majors. The total number of examinees in Hainan Province increased from 55,945 in 2022 to 67,408 in 2025, and approximately 78,000 in 2026 (data includes uncertainty markers), indicating continuous expansion of the examinee scale and intensified competition. Slight increase.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2022 baseline ranking of approximately 12,288, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2022 (19 people), and the continuous significant increase in the total number of examinees in Hainan Province (2022 to 2026 growth of about 39.5%), it is judged that competition in 2026 will be significantly more intense than in 2022, and the ranking should move backward. The predicted lowest ranking for 2026 is approximately 12,588, with a range of 12,088 to 13,088.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12,088 to 13,088, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, with Tier 1 clinical medicine majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 nursing and Chinese materia medica as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<12,088), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 clinical medicine majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>13,088), it is recommended to mainly consider Tier 3 majors.
